repoSpecificExternalPolicy.reason: Repo-specific external cache roots must stay under ~/.cache/openui-mcp-studio/, use TTL-first plus capacity-prune janitor semantics, include legacy install/trivy residue under the same governance model, and keep receipts inside repo-local space-governance reports.

browserLanePolicy.reason: The repo-owned real Chrome lane is a persistent identity/session asset. It must stay outside TTL/cap janitors and use a single-instance CDP attach model.
